## Summary

What changed?

## Why

What problem does this solve?

## Notes

Implementation details, trade-offs, or follow-up work.

## Checks

- [ ] `pnpm format:check`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm check-types`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Risk

- [ ] Low risk: docs, config, or isolated code
- [ ] Medium risk: shared package or workflow behavior
- [ ] High risk: changes core contracts, persistence, or release flow
